title: chore: harden mono-template package layout for Vite + Beads integration
body:
Plan ID: chore: harden mono-template package layout for Vite + Beads integration

Create and document the root package layout so the repository is consistently scaffolded as a multi-package template (`packages/*`, `apps/*`, workspace scripts, shared build baseline).
Phase: devenv

title: feat: add repo-level CI workflow for workspace quality gates
body:
Plan ID: feat: add repo-level CI workflow for workspace quality gates

Add GitHub Actions workflow(s) that run `npm run ci`, optional `npm run ci:nightly`, and Beads sync/verification checks for every workspace.
Phase: governance

title: feat: add agent swarm bootstrapping scripts and runbook
body:
Plan ID: feat: add agent swarm bootstrapping scripts and runbook

Ship `npm run agent:*` utilities to create seed issues, print repo context, hand off claims, and spawn a ready team of working agents.
Phase: cross-cutting

title: feat: implement scaffold/agent command for create-vibets workflow
body:
Plan ID: feat: implement scaffold/agent command for create-vibets workflow

Improve `create-vibets` entry point to orchestrate the new agent bootstrap flow with safe defaults and optional direct assignment behavior.
Phase: application

title: chore: codify noslop + agent-docs policy for autonomous agent workflows
body:
Plan ID: chore: codify noslop + agent-docs policy for autonomous agent workflows

Audit and document which agent hooks are intentionally enforced and where agent workflows can remain fast while preserving quality expectations.
Phase: governance

title: chore: publish memory-aware agent handoff guidance and run checklist
body:
Plan ID: chore: publish memory-aware agent handoff guidance and run checklist

Add docs/checklists that include memory handoff format, issue-specific context capture, and completion criteria for multi-agent work.
Phase: presentation
